title: atalantia roxburghii
intro: Atalantia roxburghii, also known as the wax apple or Chinese wax apple, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, native to the tropical regions of Asia. The plant has been found to possess various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. Atalantia roxburghii is believed to provide several health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and protecting against oxidative stress. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and also used in the form of extracts and oils for various therapeutic purposes.
